name: Dustgate Syndicate
specialty: Specialists in navigating and exploiting the ever-changing rifts, offering unmatched access to the lost treasures and dangerous secrets buried within

members.name: Thaddeus Fellshadow
members.note: A master manipulator with a mysterious past, rumored to have once served a powerful Undercity faction before breaking away

members.name: Zara Ironhands
members.note: Her gauntlet-enhanced fists are both a testament to her strength and a reminder of the family she lost to the rifts

members.name: Kael Voidwind
members.note: Haunted by visions of the rifts' origins, he's a recluse, but his arcane knowledge is unparalleled

visual: Clad in dark, layered robes with glowing runes that seem to shift with each rift they pass through, they move with a quiet confidence and grim determination, standing out among the chaos of the Undercity
reputation_note: Their successes have earned them respect, but their lack of allegiance to any faction fuels whispers of deceit and treachery
